content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Star_War_Rebellion.jpg|thumb|200px|''[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)]]'' released in February 1998.]]

A list of events in '''1998''' related to ''[[Star Wars]]''.

==January==
*[[January 1|01]] – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: The Emperor's Plague]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars Missions 5: The Hunt for Han Solo]] & ''[[Star Wars Kids 5 (1997)]]'' published.
*[[January 7|07]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 26|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 26]] released.
*[[January 12|12]] – ''[[Galaxy of Fear: The Swarm]]'' published.
*[[January 21|21]] – ''[[Boba Fett: Death, Lies, & Treachery]]'' published.
*[[January 28|28]] – [[Ariel Winter]] is born.
*28 – [[Crimson Empire 2|''Crimson Empire'' 2]] published.

==February==
*[[February 1|01]] – ''[[Star Wars Missions 6: The Search for Grubba the Hutt]]'' & ''[[Star Wars Kids 6 (1997)]] published.
*[[February 2|02]] – ''[[X-Wing: Wraith Squadron]]'' published.
*[[February 4|04]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 27|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 27]] published.
*[[February 4|04]] – [[The Last Command 3|''The Last Command'' 3]] published.
*[[February 8|08]] – [[Dark Force Rising (TPB)|''Dark Force Rising'']] released as trade paperback.
*[[February 11|11]] – [[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 1|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 1]] published.
*[[February 14|14]] – [[Roy Beck]] dies.
*[[February 15|15]] – [[Zachary Gordon]] is born.
*[[February 17|17]] – ''[[Star Wars: Jedi Knight: Mysteries of the Sith]]'' released on the PC platform.
*[[February 18|18]] – [[Crimson Empire 3|''Crimson Empire'' 3]] published.
*[[February 25|25]] – [[Star Wars Insider 36|''Star Wars Insider'' 36]] published.
*[[February 28|28]] – [[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] released on the PC platform.
*?? – [[Star Wars Galaxy Collector 1|''Star Wars Galaxy Collector'' 1]] published.

==March==
*[[March 1|01]] – [[Archie Goodwin]] dies.
*01 – ''[[Han Solo's Rescue Mission]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Luke Skywalker's Race Against Time]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars Missions 7: Ithorian Invasion]]'' published.
*[[March 4|04]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 28|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 28]] published.
*[[March 9|09]] – ''[[Rebel Dawn]]'' published.
*[[March 9|09]] – ''[[Galaxy of Fear: Spore]]'' published.
*[[March 11|11]] – ''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' published.
*11 – [[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 2|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 2]] published.
*[[March 18|18]] – [[Crimson Empire 4|''Crimson Empire'' 4]] published.
*[[March 25|25]] – [[The Last Command 4|''The Last Command'' 4]] published.
*?? – ''[[Hideouts & Strongholds]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Journey to Mos Eisley]]'' published.

==April==
*[[April 1|01]] – [[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Battleground: Tatooine (TPB)|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Battleground: Tatooine'' trade paperback]] published.
*01 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 29|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 29]] published.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars Missions 8: Togorian Trap]]'' published.
*[[April 8|08]] – [[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 3|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 3]] published.
*[[April 15|15]] – [[Crimson Empire 5|''Crimson Empire'' 5]] published.
*[[April 29|29]] – [[The Last Command 5|''The Last Command'' 5]] published.
*?? – ''[[The Far Orbit Project]]'' published.

==May==
*[[May 1|01]] – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Return to Ord Mantell]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars Missions 9: Revolt of the Battle Droids]]'' published.
*[[May 4|04]] – ''[[I, Jedi]]'' published.
*[[May 6|06]] – [[Star Wars: Tales of the Jedi — The Fall of the Sith Empire (TPB)|''Tales of the Jedi: The Fall of the Sith Empire'' trade paperback]] published.
*06 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 30|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 30]] published.
*[[May 11|11]] – ''[[Galaxy of Fear: The Doomsday Ship]]'' published.
*[[May 13|13]] – [[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 4|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 4]] published.
*[[May 20|20]] – [[Crimson Empire 6|''Crimson Empire'' 6]] published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Galaxy Collector 2|''Star Wars Galaxy Collector'' 2]] published.

==June==
*[[June 1|01]] – ''[[The Mandalorian Armor]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Alien Encounters]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars Missions 10: Showdown in Mos Eisley]]'' published.
*[[June 2|02]] – Marvel Entertainment founded
*[[June 3|03]] – ''[[Jabba the Hutt: The Art of the Deal]]'' published.
*[[June 17|17]] – [[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 5|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 5]] published.

==July==
*[[July 1|01]] – ''[[Star Wars Handbook 1: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars Journal: Hero for Hire]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars Journal: The Fight for Justice]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars Missions 11: Bounty Hunters vs. Battle Droids]] ''published.
*01 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 31|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 31]] published.
*[[July 6|06]] – ''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]'' published.
*06 – ''[[Galaxy of Fear: Clones]]'' published.
*[[July 15|15]] – [[Star Wars Manga: A New Hope 1|''Star Wars Manga: A New Hope'' 1]] published.
*[[July 21|21]] – ''[[The Essential Guide to Planets and Moons]]'' published.
*[[July 22|22]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 1|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 1]] published.
*[[July 29|29]] – [[The Last Command 6|''The Last Command'' 6]] published.
*?? – ''[[Star Wars Journal: Captive to Evil]]'' published.

==August==
*[[August 1|01]] – ''[[Star Wars Missions 12: The Vactooine Disaster]]'' published.
*[[August 5|05]] – [[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 1|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 1]] published.
*05 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 32|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 32]] published.
*[[August 12|12]] – [[Star Wars Manga: A New Hope 2|''Star Wars Manga: A New Hope'' 2]] published.
*[[August 26|26]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 2|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 2]] published.
*?? – ''[[Choose Your Own Star Wars Adventure: A New Hope]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Choose Your Own Star Wars Adventure: The Empire Strikes Back]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Choose Your Own Star Wars Adventure: Return of the Jedi]]'' published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Galaxy Collector 3|''Star Wars Galaxy Collector'' 3]] published.

==September==
*[[September 1|01]] – ''[[The Star Wars Cookbook: Wookiee Cookies and Other Galactic Recipes]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Star Wars Missions 13: Prisoner of the Nikto Pirates]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Vision of the Future]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Trouble on Cloud City]]'' published.
*[[September 2|02]] – [[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 2|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 2]] published.
*[[September 8|08]] – ''[[Galaxy of Fear: The Hunger]]'' published.
*[[September 16|16]] – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 33|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 33]] published.
*[[September 24|24]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 3|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 3]] published.
*[[September 25|25]] – Starwars.com announces "The Phantom Menace" as the name of [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|Episode I]].

==October==
*[[October 1|01]] – ''[[Star Wars Missions 14: The Monsters of Dweem]]'' published.
*[[October 7|07]] – [[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 3|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 3]] published.
*[[October 14|14]] – ''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]'' published.
*14 – [[Star Wars Manga: A New Hope 3|''Star Wars Manga: A New Hope'' 3]] published.
*[[October 17|17]] – [[Erin Kellyman]] is born.
*[[October 22|22]] – ''[[Star Wars: Incredible Cross-Sections]]'' published.
*[[October 28|28]] – [[Jedi Academy: Leviathan 1|''Jedi Academy: Leviathan'' 1]] published.
*28 – [[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 4|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 4]] published.
*28 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 34|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 34]] published.
*?? – ''[[Anakin Skywalker: The Story of Darth Vader]]'' published.
*?? – ''[[Slave Ship]]'' published.

==November==
*[[November 1|01]] – ''[[Star Wars Missions 15: Voyage to the Underworld]]'' published.
*[[November 4|04]] – [[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 4|''Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand'' 4]] published.
*04 – ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Warrior Princess (TPB)]]'' published.
*[[November 11|11]] – [[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 1|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 1]] published.
*[[November 18|18]] – [[Jedi Academy: Leviathan 2|''Jedi Academy: Leviathan'' 2]] published.
*[[November 25|25]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – Redemption 5|''Tales of the Jedi – Redemption'' 5]] published.
*25 – [[X-Wing Rogue Squadron 35|''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' 35]] published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Galaxy Collector 4|''Star Wars Galaxy Collector'' 4]] published.

==December==
*[[December 1|01]] – [[Prelude to Rebellion 0|''Prelude to Rebellion'' 0]] published
*01 – ''[[Star Wars Missions 16: Imperial Jailbreak]]'' published.
*01 – ''[[Young Jedi Knights: Crisis at Crystal Reef]]'' published.
*[[December 2|02]] – [[Star Wars Manga: A New Hope 4|''Star Wars Manga: A New Hope'' 4]] published.
*[[December 7|07]] – [[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Rogue Squadron'']] released on the PC platform.
*[[December 9|09]] – [[Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood 2|''Crimson Empire II: Council of Blood'' 2]] published.
*[[December 16|16]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 1|''Star Wars'' (1998) 1]] published.
*16 – ''[[Mara Jade – By the Emperor's Hand 5]] ''published.
*16 – [[Jedi Academy: Leviathan 3|''Jedi Academy: Leviathan'' 3]] published.
*[[December 20|20]] – [[Star Wars: Crimson Empire (TPB)|''Crimson Empire'']] released as a trade paperback.

==Unknown==
*[[Bad Robot Productions]] is founded.
*[[Galoob]] shut down as a toy company.
*[[Visceral Games]] is founded.
*''[[Classic Adventures: Volume Five]]'' published.
*''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]'' released.
*[[Ross Beadman]] is born.
*– [[Star Wars Insider 36|''Star Wars Insider'' 36]] published in February/March.
*– [[Star Wars Insider 37|''Star Wars Insider'' 37]] published in April/May.
*– [[Star Wars Insider 38|''Star Wars Insider'' 38]] published in June/July.
*– [[Star Wars Insider 39|''Star Wars Insider'' 39]] published in August/September.
*– [[Star Wars Insider 40|''Star Wars Insider'' 40]] published in October/November.
*– [[Star Wars Insider 41|''Star Wars Insider'' 41]] published in December/January [[1999]].
